name: 铜钱
readable_text_policy: 不添加文字标签、logo、水印或说明字
scale_policy: 1:1 real size with hand palm as anchor
reference_context_policy: handheld in palm or on flat surface, no clear stranger faces
reference_prompt: A pile of about a dozen ancient Chinese copper coins, each 2cm diameter, copper-colored, round with square hole in center, stacked statically in an open cloth bag held in a hand, some coins partially visible falling in, subtle metallic sheen, no text, realistic antique patina, close-up view with hand as scale reference。源记录硬约束：数量:总约十余枚；位置:胖婶子手中伸向林辰，部分落入布袋；运动政策:十余个，首帧落入袋中可见，静止堆叠

source_contract.position: 胖婶子手中伸向林辰，部分落入布袋
source_contract.motion_policy: 十余个，首帧落入袋中可见，静止堆叠
source_contract.quantity_policy: 总约十余枚，禁止新增副本
